name: MWG_Live
summary: MWG Live SDK – a modular live streaming component for iOS applications.
description:
MWG Live is a modular iOS SDK that provides live streaming related UI and business
components which can be integrated into native or hybrid applications.

The module is designed to be easily embedded inside host applications or React Native
bridges. It exposes a clean architecture using Dependency Injection, protocols and
ViewModel-driven UI so that host apps can provide user data, wallet information,
and handle callbacks such as closing the live screen or updating wallet state.

Key features:
- Modular live streaming UI module
- Clean architecture (Protocol + Dependency + ViewModel)
- Easy integration with Native iOS or React Native bridges
- Lightweight and flexible dependency injection
- Delegate callbacks for host app communication

This SDK is intended to be distributed as a reusable module inside MWG ecosystem apps.
